_meta.description: Companies flagged by BDS-related screening lists. This list is the source of truth for the Expert (US Stocks) BDS indicator and filter. Edit freely — each entry stands alone.

categories.BDS Official: Listed as an active boycott target on bdsmovement.net
categories.AFSC Investigate: Documented by the American Friends Service Committee Investigate database for involvement in Israeli settlements, military, or surveillance

notes: Only US-listed tickers are included; non-US-listed targets (Puma, AXA, Siemens, Carrefour) are matched by company name only via companyAliases.
Each entry includes a `source` URL. Verify the entry against the live page before relying on the indicator.

companies.reason: Contracts supplying ID systems and IT infrastructure to Israeli authorities, including the Israeli population registry.
Contracts supplying IT services to Israeli authorities; related to HP Inc. split.
Operator of gas fields claimed by Israel in disputed maritime areas (Leviathan, Tamar).
Franchisees market and sell properties in Israeli settlements in the occupied West Bank.
Bulldozers (notably the D9) supplied to Israeli military used in home demolitions in occupied territory.
Supplies surveillance and communications technology used at Israeli checkpoints and settlements.
Major supplier of military aircraft, missiles, and munitions to the Israeli military.
Primary supplier of F-35 and F-16 fighter aircraft to the Israeli military.
Supplies munitions and military vehicles used by the Israeli military.
Supplies military equipment and technology used by the Israeli military.
Supplies communications and electronic warfare systems to the Israeli military.
Supplies missile systems (incl. Iron Dome co-production) and military electronics.
Booking.com platform lists rental properties located in Israeli settlements in the occupied West Bank.
Lists rental properties located in Israeli settlements in the occupied West Bank.
Lists rental and hotel properties located in Israeli settlements.
Lists tourist attractions and rental properties located in Israeli settlements.
Primary Israeli defense contractor; drones, surveillance, and weapons systems used in occupied territory.
